name: toolwizhub-store-reviews
description: StoreReviews — privacy-first App Store & Play Store review triage. Fetch, categorize, prioritize & export reviews.

scripts.api:setup: cd api && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -q --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt && echo 'api venv ready'
scripts.api: cd api && { [ -x .venv/bin/python ] || { python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt; }; } && .venv/bin/python dev.py
scripts.dev: trap 'kill 0' SIGINT EXIT; (cd api && { [ -x .venv/bin/python ] || { python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt; }; } && .venv/bin/python dev.py) & python3 -m http.server 8090 --directory site & wait
scripts.api:deploy: cd api && sam build && sam deploy
